Paragraph

If \(\{ c_{k}\}\) and \(\{ \tilde c_{k}\}\) are two equivalent Cauchy sequences in \(C[a, b]\) under the \(L^{p}[a, b]\)-norm such that both \(\lim_{k\to \infty} c_{k}(x)\) and \(\lim_{k\to \infty} \tilde c_{k}(x)\) exist \(a.e.\text{,}\) then \(\lim_{k\to \infty} c_{k}(x)=\lim_{k\to \infty} \tilde c_{k}(x)\) \(a.e. \text{.}\)
in-context
